title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
(The Japanese Derby... It's finally here. But thanks
to you, I feel no hesitation.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, all the work we've put in to get to this
point has been nothing less than ideal.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I chased after Ines and managed to catch her
without changing my style.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I was also able to greatly improve upon what I
received from Ryan.
choice_data_list: Yeah. You've gotten a lot stronger.
Yeah. You've gotten a lot stronger.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We found the perfect balance for her, one that is
neither too slow nor too fast, and we stuck with it
all the way through.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our strategy is perfect, but that doesn't mean I'm
not worried.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What if something happens to throw off her
pace? What if an opponent appears whose skill
we hadn't anticipated?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And I still can't see a way to my ideal running
style...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
If things aren't in my favor here, then I may as
well just run however feels right—no overthinking
it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
No... If I do that, the others will overtake me. I've
already been told I can't brute-force my way
through this.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Right... I'll need to remain near the front while
keeping an eye on the runners behind me. I'm
curious, though...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What is Bright going to do?
